ResearchProjectDef.label: Standard Issue
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock fabrication technology for NCL-standard assault rifles and self-defense submachine guns.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Protective Gear
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research two advanced personal protective systems: tactical cloaking field generators and bio-enhanced combat suits to increase special forces survivability.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ashes to Signal
ResearchProjectDef.description: Decrypt the signals within the Red Cube to establish initial connection with the NCL Mechanoid Network. Your first step into mechanized warfare.

rulesStrings.li: subject->mechanoids
subject_story->acquired a Red Cube in shady circumstances
subject_story->found an intact Red Cube in a War Scorpion wreck
subject_gerund->unlocking certain technologies

ResearchProjectDef.label: Vanguard Units
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock medium mechanoid unit production technology.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Helios PD Turret
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop laser interception systems capable of effectively neutralizing rockets, artillery shells, and low-velocity aircraft.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Vertical Launch Interception System
ResearchProjectDef.description: The "Iron Rain" is NCL's advanced missile interception system providing full-map defense capabilities. Automatically detects and neutralizes incoming threats with precision interceptors.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Battery Systems
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research batteries with superior energy density and charge efficiency.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Nuclear Power
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research modular nuclear reactors with flexible power output capabilities.

ResearchProjectDef.label: SpectreNet Array
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop strategic anti-cloaking radar installations capable of detecting all cloaked units within operational range while providing battlefield awareness support for mechanoid forces.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Research of Megastructures
ResearchProjectDef.description: Strategic megastructure development focuses on core facilities that directly alter battlefield dynamics, including large-scale energy weapons, mechanoid modification centers, and reconnaissance satellite arrays, achieving tactical breakthroughs through technological superiority.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Tesla Beacon
ResearchProjectDef.description: Strategic energy weapon system developed by the NCL League. Channels grid reserves to summon area lightning strikes against hostile units. Critical EMP discharges paralyze enemy electronics, converting power reserves into direct battlefield suppression.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Chainwave Relay
ResearchProjectDef.description: A quantum communication node co-developed by NCL engineers and mechanitors. Provides 20 base bandwidth units initially, with signal amplification achievable through additional power consumption. Requires dedicated mechanitor bonding as service terminal for stable operation.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Heavyforge Units
ResearchProjectDef.description: Unlock heavy combat mechanoid fabrication technology to deploy primary assault forces.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Archtech Mechanoid
ResearchProjectDef.description: The Finishing Touch

ResearchProjectDef.label: Ignition of the Crucible
ResearchProjectDef.description: Activate and analyze mechanoid war beacons to unlock their core technology tree, progressively acquiring advanced military technologies originating from mechanoid civilization.

rulesStrings.li: subject->mechanoids
subject_story->acquired a Precision Memory Interface Array in shady circumstances
subject_story->found an intact Precision Memory Interface Array in a War Beacon wreck
subject_gerund->unlocking certain technologies

ResearchProjectDef.label: Doom Calculation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Research Doxa-0's battlefield control systems to unlock advanced mechanoid tactical computation.

rulesStrings.li: subject->mechanoids
subject_story->acquired a Doxa Tactical Core in shady circumstances
subject_story->found an intact Doxa Tactical Core in a Doxa wreck
subject_story->survived a mechanoid hive assault
subject_story->collated reports of mechanoid attacks, looking for commonalities
subject_gerund->creating Titan mechanoids

ResearchProjectDef.label: Fortress Protocol
ResearchProjectDef.description: Analyze the Fortified Shell Construct's composite armor systems and battlefield control protocols to master the ultimate mechanoid siege unit's operational principles.

rulesStrings.li: subject->mechanoids
subject_story->acquired an Armor Blitz Warfare Core in shady circumstances
subject_story->found an intact Armor Blitz Warfare Core in a Shell FortConstruct wreck
subject_story->survived a mechanoid hive assault
subject_story->collated reports of mechanoid attacks, looking for commonalities
subject_gerund->creating Titan mechanoids

ResearchProjectDef.label: Cybernethetic Arbo
ResearchProjectDef.description: Strategic structure for mass permanent enhancement of allied mechanoids.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Experimental-Grade Technology
ResearchProjectDef.description: Access NCL's most advanced prototype weapon systems.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Cerebrex Core Reactivation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Ready for greater challenges?

ResearchProjectDef.label: Seraphiron
ResearchProjectDef.description: This will be a flying mechanoid boss currently in development - stay tuned.
